title: Crab-Free Prawn Pilaf
description: A flavorful pilaf dish made with prawns and aerated ingredients. This recipe is a great alternative to traditional crab-based dishes.

ingredients.name: kenyan pilaf mix
ingredients.notes: any type of pilaf mix can be used

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the prawns and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Add the pilaf mix and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the liquid is absorbed.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot with lemon wedges on the side.
